rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRUST OF JOHN A. WROTEN JR., AND VIRGINIA WROTEN, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Hui Wen Dhang, Feng Chiao Lo, Ying Tsi, And Eric Ho To Enforce The Settlement Agreement Against Petitioner Leslie Thomas, Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; And Declaration Of Marcus T. Brown
rulings.Rulings: The motion to enforce the settlement agreement is granted. It is not a defense that Petitioner claims she failed to read or understand the agreement she signed, which clearly set forth the consequences of a failure to sell the property for more than the designated minimum price. The Court will order that judgment be entered on the terms set out in the settlement agreement. That order, of course, does not adjudicate what additional procedures, if any, are required under the Rent Act to secure possession. Nor does it adjudicate what rights, if any, Mr. Flachman, a nonparty to this proceeding, may have. Any party wishing to cotest this tentative ruling and argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, August 7, 2012.
